<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please fill out the checklist below.
For substantial changes, open an issue first to discuss the approach.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what changes and why. Link the related issue if any. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behaviour to change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup (no behaviour change)

## Checklist

- [ ] Pest test added that fails before this change and passes after.
- [ ] `composer quality` passes clean (Rector, Pint, PHPStan level max).
- [ ] `composer test` passes locally against Postgres 14+.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` using Keep a Changelog categories.
- [ ] README / docblocks updated if public API changed.
- [ ] Conventional Commit prefix on the PR title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …).

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should look at first, edge cases, perf considerations, migration impact. -->
